name: pause-health-mcp
description: MCP server that exposes the Pause-Health.ai MuleSoft Experience APIs (patient timeline, intake, provider directory) as tools for AI agents. Today fronts a mocked Experience API plane; in production it transparently fronts a customer's MuleSoft Anypoint Experience tier (no client changes -- only PAUSE_MCP_BASE_URL changes).

env.name: PAUSE_MCP_BASE_URL
env.description: Base URL for the Experience APIs. Default https://pause-health.ai.

env.name: PAUSE_MCP_API_KEY
env.description: Optional bearer token sent as Authorization: Bearer <key>.

tools.name: get_patient_timeline
tools.description: Return a FHIR R5 Bundle for a patient: Patient resource + raw wearable Observations + DBDP-computed feature Observation with derivedFrom provenance.

tools.name: get_patient_intake
tools.description: Return the structured intake record produced by the Salesforce Agentforce Service Agent (chief complaint, symptom cluster, red-flag screen, triage recommendation).

tools.name: find_menopause_providers
tools.description: Search Pause's provider directory by ZIP, menopause-certified flag, and insurance plan. Providers are ranked by distance from the patient's ZIP when its Census ZCTA centroid is known (graph-score ranking is the fallback when distance can't be computed). Every returned provider is currently-licensed (sanctioned providers are filtered at build time). Read the response `matchType` and `sort` fields to present results accurately.

tools.name: experience_api_health
tools.description: Liveness check for the Experience API plane.

mockedExperienceApis.note: These endpoints are deterministic mocks served by the Next.js frontend. In production they are replaced by MuleSoft Anypoint Experience APIs running on the customer's Runtime Fabric or CloudHub 2.0. The MCP tool surface does not change.

registerInClient.claudeDesktop: Add to ~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json under mcpServers.pause-health using transport.command and transport.args.
registerInClient.cursor: Add to ~/.cursor/mcp.json (or the project-local .cursor/mcp.json) under mcpServers.pause-health using transport.command and transport.args.
registerInClient.agentforce: Register behind the Salesforce External Services connector or Agentforce MCP gateway; point PAUSE_MCP_BASE_URL at the customer's Anypoint Experience-tier base URL.
